overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long ISRG Daily ETF (ISUL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Intuitive Surgical, Inc. stock. ISUL was launched on Oct 7, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.
